title: pull: add new line after `Trying to pull $image...`
body:
A user asked for improving the readability for the logs:

```
...
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.mountopt=nodev,metacopy=on]localhost:5000/busybox:latest" 
Trying to pull localhost:5000/busybox...DEBU[0000] reference rewritten from 'localhost:5000/busybox:latest' to 'docker.io/library/busybox:latest' 
DEBU[0000] reference rewritten from 'localhost:5000/busybox:latest' to 'fakeserver.com/bar/busybox:latest' 
...
```

Note the `Trying to pull localhost:5000/busybox...DEBU[0000]` which is on a normal log level followed by `Getting image source signatures`.

comments.body:
It’s not quite clear to me what the desired change is.

Anyway, note that `Trying to pull %s...` (with the three dots) is not printed by the c/image mirror selection code, it’s the libpod search path loop.
Ooops. I opened the issue in a rush without looking at the code assuming the print to stdout comes from image. I'll transfer the issue over to libpod.
